title: quekettia peruviana
intro: Quekettia peruviana is a species of orchid native to Peru, characterized by its unique, funnel-shaped flowers. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, derived from its alkaloid content. The Quekettia peruviana is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used in the form of infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
